text:
Congrats to the @Starlink engineering & production teams on excellent work!

It was great to see everyone when I walked the production line in Redmond on Wednesday 🖤✨
summary: Congrats to the @Starlink engineering & production teams on excellent work! It was great to see everyone when I walked the production line in Redmond on Wednesday 🖤✨
ai_summary: Elon Musk acknowledges the Starlink engineering and production teams for their work, noting a recent facility visit to the Redmond production line. This demonstrates active leadership engagement in manufacturing operations and serves as a recognition of team execution in scaling Starlink's satellite internet production, highlighting the importance of on-site operational oversight in hardware manufacturing businesses.
embed_html:
Congrats to the @Starlink engineering & production teams on excellent work!

It was great to see everyone when I walked the production line in Redmond on Wednesday 🖤✨

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 8, 2026

text: It was an honor to be shown the awesome @Intel fab in Oregon this week. Looking forward to a great partnership with @SpaceX & @Tesla!
summary: It was an honor to be shown the awesome @Intel fab in Oregon this week. Looking forward to a great partnership with @SpaceX & @Tesla!
ai_summary: Elon Musk visited Intel's fabrication plant in Oregon and announced a partnership with SpaceX and Tesla. This signals Intel's role in supplying semiconductor manufacturing capabilities for SpaceX's avionics and Tesla's computing needs, highlighting the critical importance of securing domestic chip production for advanced aerospace and automotive applications at scale.
embed_html:
It was an honor to be shown the awesome @Intel fab in Oregon this week. Looking forward to a great partnership with @SpaceX & @Tesla!

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 8, 2026

text: Tesla AI Vision deploys airbags before impact, which greatly reduces risk of injury or death. This comes for free on all new cars. https://t.co/828FOgD2SI
summary: Tesla AI Vision deploys airbags before impact, which greatly reduces risk of injury or death. This comes for free on all new cars.
ai_summary: Tesla is deploying an AI Vision system that uses computer vision to detect imminent collisions and automatically deploys airbags before impact occurs, improving passenger safety outcomes. This demonstrates Tesla's practical application of AI/ML technology in autonomous safety features and represents a competitive product differentiator that comes standard on all new vehicles, showcasing how advanced AI integration can reduce injury/death risk in automotive manufacturing.
embed_html:
Tesla AI Vision deploys airbags before impact, which greatly reduces risk of injury or death. This comes for free on all new cars. https://t.co/828FOgD2SI

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 9, 2026

text: Try Grok Voice for your customer support https://t.co/pSq9YH3eO3
summary: Try Grok Voice for your customer support
ai_summary: Elon Musk promotes Grok Voice as a customer support solution, highlighting xAI's expansion into practical business applications beyond conversational AI. This demonstrates a direct go-to-market strategy for deploying Grok's voice capabilities to solve enterprise customer service challenges, positioning xAI's technology as a competitive alternative to existing customer support platforms.

Try Grok Voice for your customer support https://t.co/pSq9YH3eO3
